question: Based on the stacked area chart showing quarterly store operations indicators, which conclusion about overall store performance is most appropriate?

options.A: Q4 has the best overall performance because it shows the highest combined area of all indicators.
options.B: Q1 has the best overall performance because revenue is highest while energy usage is lowest.
options.C: The chart cannot determine overall performance accurately because it stacks different indicators with incompatible units.
options.D: Q2 has the best overall performance because all indicators remain relatively stable.

explanation: The chart stacks unrelated metrics (Revenue, Energy Usage, etc.) into a cumulative area. These metrics have different units and meanings, so adding them together creates a meaningless total. The stacked area cannot be used to assess overall performance. Only individual metric analysis is valid.
